changes.reason: Isolate the pullback tail where the latest worst MAE came from: pullback_long is the core PnL engine, but the worst row entered with ES structure score 3, negative higher-low, negative higher-high, flat VWAP slope, and no early MFE. This is a profile-specific upstream-entry test, not a global veto.

Keep the pullback profile inside the current profitable reclaim band while avoiding weaker, closer-to-VWAP churn. A cap of 8.5 still covers the worst row's 6.34 VWAP distance, so this change is paired with structure tightening to test whether score, not extension, is the separator.
Pullback_long has strong PnL but owns the largest tail; keep upside capture bounded while the entry-quality test runs so wider dynamic targets do not lengthen marginal recoveries.

Hold the fixed pullback target at the current conservative grid floor while testing entry quality. This intentionally avoids profit-expansion via wider exits because recent take-profit families are saturated and because pullback tail risk is entry-driven.

expected_effect: Should reduce pullback_long deep-heat entries and improve average/worst MAE without touching fallback routing or option-confirmed profiles. Main risk is cutting profitable score-3 pullbacks, so reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, pullback PnL drops materially, or trade count falls more than 10%.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_c_pullback_long_distance as a narrow upstream-entry experiment on the only profile that both dominates profit and owns the latest worst MAE. The latest pullback_long produced 31 trades, $2294.6 PnL, 249.7 PnL/exposure hour, but also worst MAE -392. Broad hidden signatures were destructive, so this is a small profile-specific structure test rather than global veto tightening or runtime exits. Data-state classification is available; this only touches VALID_0DTE pullback_long and leaves MISSING/STALE/1DTE routing unchanged.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: pullback_long generated 39.3% of latest PnL but the worst trade entered with ES structure score 3, higher-low -0.5, higher-high -4.0, VWAP slope 0.0015, zero early MFE, and 132.9 minute hold. The profile remains profitable enough that a broad prune is unacceptable.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Pullback Structure Floor Holdout
strategy_hypotheses.risk: ES score-3 pullbacks are also a meaningful profit bucket; this may suppress the core edge if score does not truly separate tail from fast winners.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entries with weak ES structure score before reclaim continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Pullback_long average MAE and worst MAE improve while total net profit stays >=98% of run_001, pullback_long PnL retention stays >=90%, pnl_per_exposure_hour is flat or better, and completed trades drop <=10%.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The latest run is a profitable long-biased momentum/pullback regime but below the leader base. It produced 110 trades, $5835.2 PnL, 94.5% win rate, no slow >=12h trades, worst M...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Holdout
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current 1DTE PnL, total PnL >=98% of leader base, and 1DTE average MAE improves versus -119.29.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >=90% pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE and PnL per exposure hour.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant pullback_long_1dte Activation Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 5 routed trades or clear non-reachability signal; combined 1DTE PnL non-degrading and average MAE better than breakout_long_1dte alone.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Holdout
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Positive standalone PnL, average MAE below active-profile median, and no reduction in protected fast-winner count.

next_experiments.primary_metric: Risk-adjusted score, retained PnL >=98% of base, protected fast winners down <=2, worst MAE improves or average MAE improves without PnL/hour decay.

next_experiments.config_bias: Do not repeat previous 1DTE tightening. Instead test a routing/sample split that adds a 1DTE pullback companion while leaving breakout_long_1dte quality mostly intact.

next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL, total score, 1DTE average MAE, and 1DTE PnL/exposure hour.

next_experiments.config_bias: Sample expansion should be stricter and more conditional than prior call-wall loosening: keep strong ADX/setup/acceptance context and avoid lowering several flow gates at once.
next_experiments.name: Call-Wall Precision Sample Builder
next_experiments.primary_metric: At least 3-5 call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, average MAE better than -60, and total PnL >=98% of leader base.

next_experiments.config_bias: Restore profit-expansion posture by freezing failed risk exits and fallback edits; use leader-base behavior as the benchmark and avoid runtime health exits in this batch.
next_experiments.name: Regression Guardrail Batch
next_experiments.primary_metric: Score stays near or above leader base, net PnL >= leader base, no increase in slow >=12h trades, and PnL/exposure hour >=197.
